meta.title: 媒体素养与信息时代
meta.description: Advanced native-level discourse on media literacy in Chinese: echo chambers, critical thinking, and formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 격조 높은 원어민 수준의 미디어 리터러시 담화: 정보 편식, 비판적 사고, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「媒体素养」(méitǐ sùyǎng) means "media literacy".

questions.prompt: 「媒体素养」是什么意思？(What does 媒体素养 mean?)

explanation.en: 「信息茧房」(xìnxī jiǎnfáng) means "information cocoon", the phenomenon of being trapped in an echo chamber of similar views.
explanation.ko: 「信息茧房」(xìnxī jiǎnfáng)는 비슷한 견해에만 갇히는 '정보 누에고치' 현상을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「信息茧房」是什么意思？(What does 信息茧房 mean?)
choices: 信息茧房(information cocoon — echo chamber effect)

explanation.en: 「以讹传讹」is an idiom meaning "to spread misinformation, each retelling making it more distorted".
explanation.ko: 「以讹传讹」는 잘못된 정보를 계속 잘못 전달하며 왜곡을 키우는 것을 뜻하는 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「以讹传讹」是什么意思？(What does 以讹传讹 mean?)
choices: 以讹传讹(spreading misinformation through repeated relaying of false information)

explanation.en: 「批判性思维」(pīpànxìng sīwéi) means "critical thinking".

questions.prompt: 「批判性思维」是什么意思？(What does 批判性思维 mean?)

explanation.en: 「众声喧哗」describes the cacophonous, chaotic mix of many voices speaking at once, especially online.
explanation.ko: 「众声喧哗」는 온라인에서 수많은 목소리가 뒤섞여 소란스러운 모습을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 「众声喧哗」用来形容什么？(What does 众声喧哗 describe?)
choices: 网络上众多声音同时表达、纷繁复杂的景象(the cacophony of many voices speaking simultaneously online)

explanation.en: 「媒体素养」means "media literacy".

questions.prompt: 在信息爆炸的时代，提升公众的___显得尤为重要。(In an era of information explosion, improving public media literacy is especially important.)

explanation.en: 「信息茧房」means "information cocoon/echo chamber".

questions.prompt: 算法推荐容易让用户陷入___，只接触到与自己观点相似的信息。(Algorithm recommendations can easily trap users in an information cocoon, only exposing them to information similar to their own views.)

explanation.en: 「以讹传讹」describes misinformation being repeatedly distorted.
explanation.ko: 「以讹传讹」는 잘못된 정보가 반복해서 왜곡되는 것을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 网络谣言的传播往往是___的过程，越传越离谱。(The spread of online rumors is often a process of "misinformation compounding misinformation," getting more absurd with each retelling.)

explanation.en: 「批判性思维」means "critical thinking".

questions.prompt: 面对海量的网络信息，我们需要具备___，才能辨别真伪。(Facing massive amounts of online information, we need critical thinking in order to distinguish truth from falsehood.)

explanation.en: 「众声喧哗」describes many voices talking at once chaotically.
explanation.ko: 「众声喧哗」는 여러 목소리가 뒤섞여 소란스러운 모습을 묘사한다.

questions.prompt: 社交媒体上关于这个话题的讨论呈现出一片___的景象。(The discussion about this topic on social media presents a scene of cacophonous voices.)

explanation.en: 「暴露」means "to expose".

questions.prompt: 这场舆论风波___了公众对信息真实性核实机制缺失的担忧。(This public opinion storm exposed public concern over the lack of a mechanism to verify the authenticity of information.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其被动接受算法推送的信息，___不如主动拓宽自己的信息渠道。(Rather than passively accepting information pushed by algorithms, it's better to proactively broaden one's own information channels.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".

questions.prompt: 这条信息___来源看起来权威，___需要经过多方核实才能采信。(Even if this piece of information appears to come from an authoritative source, it still needs to be verified from multiple sources before being trusted.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.

questions.prompt: 虚假信息之所以能够广泛传播，___是因为它往往迎合了人们的情绪和偏见。(The reason misinformation can spread so widely is precisely because it often caters to people's emotions and biases.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".

questions.prompt: 一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，___难以在短时间内澄清。(Once an unverified piece of news is widely shared, it becomes hard to clarify it in a short period of time.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，提升媒体素养的关键___在于培养独立思考的能力。(In the final analysis, the key to improving media literacy still lies in cultivating the ability to think independently.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".

questions.prompt: 由此可见，平台责任与用户素养___决定着信息生态的健康程度。(From this we can see that both platform responsibility and user literacy determine the health of the information ecosystem.)

explanation.en: 「往往」(wǎngwǎng) means "often/frequently".

questions.prompt: 众所周知，社交媒体的算法___倾向于推送能激发用户强烈情绪的内容。(As everyone knows, social media algorithms tend to push content that can provoke strong emotional reactions from users.)

explanation.en: 「揭露」(jiēlù) means "to expose/uncover".

questions.prompt: 这篇深度报道___了这起事件背后复杂的利益纠葛。(This in-depth report uncovers the complex web of interests behind this incident.)

explanation.en: 「辨别真伪」(biànbié zhēnwěi) means "to distinguish truth from falsehood".

questions.prompt: 在信息泛滥的时代，学会___是每个网民的必修课。(In an era of information overload, learning to distinguish true from false is a required course for every internet user.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 主动拓宽〜: 不如主动拓宽 (not 主动不如拓宽).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '主动拓宽〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如主动拓宽'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其被动接受算法推送的信息，主动不如拓宽自己的信息渠道。(Rather than passively accepting information pushed by algorithms, it's better to proactively broaden one's own information channels.) — find the error
choices: 与其被动接受算法推送的信息，不如主动拓宽自己的信息渠道。
与其被动接受算法推送的信息，主动不如拓宽自己的信息渠道。
与其被动接受算法推送的信息，不如拓宽主动自己的信息渠道。
与其被动接受算法推送的信息，主动拓宽不如自己的信息渠道。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 虚假信息之所以能够广泛传播，因为是它往往迎合了人们的情绪和偏见。(The reason misinformation can spread so widely is precisely because it often caters to people's emotions and biases.) — find the error
choices: 虚假信息之所以能够广泛传播，是因为它往往迎合了人们的情绪和偏见。
虚假信息之所以能够广泛传播，因为是它往往迎合了人们的情绪和偏见。
虚假信息之所以能够广泛传播，是它因为往往迎合了人们的情绪和偏见。
虚假信息之所以能够广泛传播，它是因为往往迎合了人们的情绪和偏见。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，难以才在短时间内澄清。(Once an unverified piece of news is widely shared, it becomes hard to clarify it in a short period of time.) — find the error
choices: 一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，就难以在短时间内澄清。
一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，难以才在短时间内澄清。
一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，才难以在短时间内澄清。
一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，难以在才短时间内澄清。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其被动接受算法推送的信息，不如主动拓宽自己的信息渠道 ("Rather than passively accepting information pushed by algorithms, it's better to proactively broaden one's own information channels").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其被动接受算法推送的信息，不如主动拓宽自己的信息渠道' (알고리즘이 밀어주는 정보를 수동적으로 받느니 차라리 능동적으로 자신의 정보 채널을 넓히는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其被动接受算法推送的信息，__________自己的信息渠道。(Rather than passively accepting information pushed by algorithms, it's better to proactively broaden one's own information channels.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，就难以在短时间内澄清 ("Once an unverified piece of news is widely shared, it becomes hard to clarify it in a short period of time").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，就难以在短时间内澄清' (검증되지 않은 소식은 일단 널리 퍼지면 단시간에 해명하기 어려워진다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一条未经核实的消息一旦被广泛转发，__________在短时间内澄清。(Once an unverified piece of news is widely shared, it becomes hard to clarify it in a short period of time.)
